summary: Regression run after code-quality refactor (predict_ai helpers, SavedPredictionInput Pydantic model, env-driven test creds, frontend lint/key fixes). All 22 backend pytest tests pass (added test_saved_unknown_game_400 to cover new 400 validation branch). Frontend E2E flows all pass: landing loads, protected routes redirect to /auth, admin login+dashboard render, game toggle, statistical + AI predictions each return 3 sets with correct main/bonus counts, save persists, saved page lists & deletes, register->dashboard, logout re-protects routes. Real historical draws: lotto=52, euromillions=52 (previous lotto scraper regression is fixed).
critical_code_review_comments: predict_ai now split into _build_ai_prompt / _call_ai / _ai_fallback / _sanitize_predictions - clean and unit-testable. Exception handler still uses `except Exception:` broadly but now logs with exc_info=True (good). Consider narrowing to (json.JSONDecodeError, KeyError, RequestException) if desired.

SavedPredictionInput has no numeric bounds on main_numbers/bonus_numbers. It rejects unknown game (400) but a user can still POST main_numbers=[999,1000,...] outside 1..main_max. Not a functional blocker but worth adding conint(ge=1, le=cfg.main_max) validation.
POST /api/refresh/{game} correctly guarded (admin only) - confirmed in code.
auth.py set_auth_cookies still uses secure=False; acceptable for local but should be env-driven for production HTTPS deployment.

backend/tests/backend_test.py hard-codes a default BASE_URL fallback ('https://jackpot-analyzer-24.preview.emergentagent.com'). Per env-var guideline, should raise if REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is missing rather than silently defaulting.
test_credentials: admin@lottopredict.app / admin123 works. Tests register disposable test_user_<uuid>@lottopredict.app / Passw0rd! per run.
seed_data_creation: Each pytest run registers 2 disposable users via /api/auth/register; not cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: cd /app && pytest backend/tests/backend_test.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml (22 tests, ~5s). Real Emergent LLM AI call is exercised in TestPredictions::test_ai. Draw counts verified: lotto=52, euromillions=52. Frontend testids all present under pages/Dashboard.jsx, Auth.jsx, Saved.jsx, Navbar.jsx.
rca of the issue: No unresolved issues. Prior iteration_1 lotto-only-10-draws issue no longer reproduces - both games return 52 real historical draws through /api/draws and /api/stats.
